examples: Best wishes for your happy birthday. May you lifelong prosperously.
And we fasted, and besought our God for this: and it fell out prosperously unto us.
A traveler saw many flowers blooming prosperously and picked all the way as he walked.
We are again in one of those periods in which Americans doubt whether our economy can adjust prosperously to ever- increasing global competition.
But whether the economy fares prosperously or poorly in the years ahead, Pentagon spending is not going to stay where it is today, and planning on the assumption it will is bad management.
